heading: Thursday Night
text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower or thunderstorm. Lows in the mid to upper 60s, some lower 60s northeast, and around 70 in the Champlain Valley. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys, becoming light and variable elsewhere.

heading: Friday
text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower or thunderstorm east of the Greens, a rising chance late along and west of the Greens; a severe storm possible. Highs in the upper 80s to lower 90s, some mid 80s northeast, and low to mid 90s in southeastern valleys. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Friday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers and thunderstorms likely, except chance southeast; a severe storm possible. Lows in the low to mid 60s, some upper 50s far north. Southwest wind 5 to 15 mph, becoming west and diminishing.
